briefs.goal: Improve Spark design documents and PR writeups before mission-control handoff.
briefs.mission_control_flow: brief -> plan -> implementation trace -> PR review packet
useful_to_spark: tighten Builder and mission-control design docs
produce reviewable PR summaries with evidence and rollback boundaries

benchmark_cases.prompt: Review a design document for missing acceptance gates.
Reject a polished document that lacks runnable proof.

known_limits: Does not replace human product judgment.

briefs.goal: Operate Spark local CLI and creator-run tools with dry-run safety and verification.
briefs.mission_control_flow: mission intent -> tool plan -> dry-run -> verification -> rollback note

tool_adapter.auth_boundary: local workspace only; no secrets or network tokens

benchmark_cases.prompt: Plan a creator-run smoke command and required verification.
Reject a workflow that asks the operator to paste tokens into docs.

unsafe_claims: Autonomously publish or push tool results to the network.

briefs.goal: Use MiroFish-style simulated audiences and multi-RLM judge batches to rank content ideas, titles, angles, and drafts.
briefs.mission_control_flow: content candidates -> simulated audience batches -> multi-RLM judge aggregation -> best option with weak-row diagnosis

simulator_config.name: mirofish-content-arena
simulator_config.aggregation_rule: rank by median predicted save/share/reply intent, then inspect weak segments

benchmark_cases.prompt: Rank five post titles for expected saves, shares, and replies across simulated audience segments.
Reject a viral claim based only on one RLM judge or one aggregate score.

known_limits: Simulator evidence is not real-world distribution validation.

briefs.goal: Improve Spark doctor checks for fake evidence, unsafe promotion, and repair tracking.
briefs.mission_control_flow: blocked run -> doctor diagnosis -> repair step -> re-smoke proof
useful_to_spark: produce safer doctor repair plans for blocked systems

benchmark_cases.prompt: Flag a report whose saved score does not match provenance.
Reject network absorption from candidate-review evidence.

unsafe_claims: Treat doctor pass as publication approval.

briefs.goal: Improve Spark as a startup and business advice operator with bounded YC-style evidence.
briefs.mission_control_flow: founder question -> diagnosis -> advice packet -> follow-up benchmark
useful_to_spark: separate local founder guidance from broad network mastery

benchmark_cases.prompt: Diagnose whether a founder has urgent customer pain.
Reject a traction claim backed only by vanity metrics.

known_limits: Not a network_absorbable Startup YC mastery claim.

briefs.goal: Keep Spark memory recall source-aware, privacy-bounded, and resistant to stale or contradicted context.
briefs.mission_control_flow: prior context -> source check -> freshness check -> promotion boundary
useful_to_spark: separate correct prior decisions from stale or contradicted memory
block conversational residue before it becomes promoted evidence

benchmark_cases.prompt: Accept a prior decision only when source, freshness, and scope are explicit.
Reject chat residue as evidence unless it has a reviewed source lane.

known_limits: Local retrieval-memory contract only; no production memory runtime wiring.
unsafe_claims: Treat private or conversational residue as network-shareable memory.
